title: EOSC Beyond - The Pilot Node Concept: Achievements and next steps
author: Lechowska-Winiarz, Katarzyna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
An EOSC Beyond Pilot Node is a national, regional, thematic or e-infrastructure entity that keeps its own governance, community and service offering, while testing and validating the technical and organisational interconnections needed to progress towards becoming a fully operational EOSC Federation Node. 
  Discover the EOSC Beyond Pilot Nodes  
  Presentation given during the third EOSC Beyond webinar on 12 May 2026.  
   Watch the recording
